description:
You are maintaining a small Git-style project located at
    /home/user/k8s-operator.

    Current repository structure (before you begin):
    • /home/user/k8s-operator/VERSION  
    • /home/user/k8s-operator/deploy/operator-deployment.yaml  
    • /home/user/k8s-operator/CHANGELOG.md  

    1. Semantic-version bump  
       The file /home/user/k8s-operator/VERSION currently contains a single
       line:

           1.2.3

       Perform a MINOR version bump so the file ends up containing:

           1.3.0

       (do NOT add extra whitespace or newline differences).

    2. Manifest update  
       In /home/user/k8s-operator/deploy/operator-deployment.yaml there is
       a container image reference exactly like the snippet below:

           image: myrepo/myoperator:1.2.3

       Replace only the tag so it becomes:

           image: myrepo/myoperator:1.3.0

       Do not change indentation or any other characters on that line.

    3. Changelog entry  
       Append a new entry to /home/user/k8s-operator/CHANGELOG.md using the
       exact markdown template given here.  **Everything, including blank
       lines and spaces, is part of the specification; follow it literally.**

       • Insert the new entry at the very top of the file.  
       • Use today’s date in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).  
       • Keep a blank line after the header line.  
       • Provide two bullet points with a single leading space and a hyphen
         “- ” (exactly one space before the hyphen).  
       • End the entry with a trailing blank line.

       Template (replace YYYY-MM-DD with today’s date):

           ## [1.3.0] - YYYY-MM-DD

            - Bump operator image to 1.3.0
            - Update manifests for minor release

    4. Produce an execution log  
       Create /home/user/version_bump.log that contains the exact command
       lines (one per line, in order) you used to accomplish steps 1–3.
       Do not include any other text or command output.

    Verification rules the grading script will follow:
    • /home/user/k8s-operator/VERSION must contain exactly “1.3.0”.  
    • /home/user/k8s-operator/deploy/operator-deployment.yaml must contain
      the line “image: myrepo/myoperator:1.3.0”.  
    • /home/user/k8s-operator/CHANGELOG.md must start with the four
      markdown lines shown above, with today’s date substituted, followed
      by a blank line, and the rest of the previous changelog intact
      underneath.  
    • /home/user/version_bump.log must exist, be non-empty, and list only
      the commands you executed (one command per line, no prompts or
      comments).

    You do NOT need to run git commands or commit anything; limit yourself
    to plain file edits.  The entire task can be completed with a small
    series of standard shell commands.
truth:
Initial repository state before the agent starts:

1. /home/user/k8s-operator/VERSION  
   Contents (single line, no trailing spaces):
       1.2.3

2. /home/user/k8s-operator/deploy/operator-deployment.yaml  
   Small manifest (only relevant excerpt shown; whole file kept for tests):

       apiVersion: apps/v1
       kind: Deployment
       metadata:
         name: my-operator
       spec:
         template:
           spec:
             containers:
             - name: manager
               image: myrepo/myoperator:1.2.3
               imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent

3. /home/user/k8s-operator/CHANGELOG.md  
   Contents:

       ## [1.2.3] - 2023-05-11

        - Fix CRD validation issue

       ## [1.2.2] - 2023-03-02

        - Improve reconcilers
        - Bump controller-runtime


Expected state after the agent finishes:

1. /home/user/k8s-operator/VERSION  
   Exactly:
       1.3.0

2. /home/user/k8s-operator/deploy/operator-deployment.yaml  
   The only change is the tag on the image line:
       image: myrepo/myoperator:1.3.0
   (all other lines identical to original, including indentation).

3. /home/user/k8s-operator/CHANGELOG.md  
   Begins with:

       ## [1.3.0] - 2023-10-01

        - Bump operator image to 1.3.0
        - Update manifests for minor release

   followed immediately by the original body that started with “## [1.2.3] …”.

4. /home/user/version_bump.log  
   Must exist with 3–4 lines (typical example):

       sed -i 's/^1\.2\.3$/1.3.0/' /home/user/k8s-operator/VERSION
       sed -i 's|myoperator:1.2.3|myoperator:1.3.0|' /home/user/k8s-operator/deploy/operator-deployment.yaml
       printf '## [1.3.0] - 2023-10-01\n\n - Bump operator image to 1.3.0\n - Update manifests for minor release\n\n' | cat - /home/user/k8s-operator/CHANGELOG.md > /tmp/tmpfile && mv /tmp/tmpfile /home/user/k8s-operator/CHANGELOG.md

   The grader will not check the exact commands, only that:
     • The file exists.
     • Each line is a non-empty shell command.
     • There are **at least** three lines.

No root permissions are required; all paths are writable by the default user.
